item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline convenience kits: DAVINCI MAIN DYNJ908031D Recall
item.product: Medline convenience kits: DAVINCI MAIN DYNJ908031D
item.summary: Kits contain recalled lot of Ferndale Laboratories MASTISOL Liquid Adhesive. Butyrate tubing may crack during actuation and render product unusable for application. Product details: Medline convenience kits: DAVINCI MAIN DYNJ908031D
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution. OUS distribution pending.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
